zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Mae Stevens Shawe於1500年出生在英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達時，她的父親Stephen Shawe26歲，母親Margarete24歲。她於大約1519年與John Shawe在英國肯特貝黑斯達結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1541年7月28日在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Mae Stevens Shawe于1500年出生在英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達时，她的父亲Stephen Shawe26岁，母亲Margarete24岁。她于大约1519年与John Shawe在英国肯特貝黑斯達结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1541年7月28日在她的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達。

nameMeanings.name: Stevens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

variants.name: Stephans
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of North German Steffans, a patronymic from Steffan , or of its cognate Steffens .

variants.name: Steeves
meanings: English (Lancashire): from a shortened form of   Stevens  . Compare   Steveson  .

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Scottish, English, Dutch, and North German: from the personal name Steven, from Latin Stephanus, Greek Stephanos ‘crown’. This was a popular name throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages, having been borne by the first Christian martyr, stoned to death at Jerusalem three years after the death of Christ. In North America, this surname has also absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. German Steffen , German and Polish Stefan , Slovenian and Slovak Štefan, Hungarian István (see Istvan ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see Stevens ).

nameMeanings.name: Shawe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Shaw
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English s(c)hawe, s(c)haghe ‘small wood, grove, thicket’ (Old English sceaga). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a small wood, or habitational, for someone from any of the many places so named. Shaw and Shawe are most frequent in Lancashire and Yorkshire, where Shaw in Oldham (Lancashire) may be a principal source of the surname. The English and Lowland Scottish surname was also established in Ireland in the 17th century.
Scottish: shortened form of various surnames from the Gaelic personal name Sitheach, derived from sithech ‘wolf’.
Irish (Down and Antrim): adopted for Ó Síthigh ‘descendant of Sítheach’, a personal name based on sítheach ‘peaceful’. Compare Sheehy .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Mae
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of May , possibly influenced by Maeve . It was borne by the American film actress Mae West ( 1892–1980 ), whose prominent bust led to her name being given, by members of the RAF, to a type of inflatable life jacket used in the Second World War. This spelling is not much used, except in compounds such as Ellie-Mae, Lily-Mae, and Daisy-Mae.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Mae Stevens Shawe was born in 1500, in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen Shawe, was 26 and her mother, Margarete, was 24. She married John Shawe about 1519, in Bethersden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 28 July 1541, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Mae Stevens Shawe est née en 1500, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Shawe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margarete, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Shawe environ 1519, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 juillet 1541, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Mae Stevens Shawe 1500 in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen Shawe 26 und ihre Mutter Margarete 24. Sie hat um 1519 in Bethersden, Kent, England John Shawe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 28. Juli 1541 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Mae Stevens Shawe è nata il nel 1500 nel Bethersden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Stephen Shawe, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margarete, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Shawe circa 1519, nel Bethersden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 luglio 1541, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Bethersden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Mae Stevens Shaweが1500年にイギリスイギリスケントベスエルスデンで生まれた時，父Stephen Shaweは26歳，母Margareteは24歳であった。約1519年にイギリスケントベスエルスデンでJohn Shaweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1541年7月28日に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントベスエルスデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Mae Stevens Shawe(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베더즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Shawe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarete(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1519년 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 John Shawe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1541년 7월 28일 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베더즈든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Mae Stevens Shawe nasceu em 1500, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Shawe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margarete, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Shawe aproximadamente 1519, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 28 de julho de 1541, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Mae Stevens Shawe родилась в 1500 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen Shawe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarete, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Shawe около 1519 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 28 июля 1541 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Mae Stevens Shawe nació en 1500, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen Shawe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margarete, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Shawe aproximadamente 1519, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de julio de 1541, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
